summary.weather: Seoul (Monday, March 30, 2026: Clear skies, stable temperatures for start of trading week).
summary.market: Market Update (Mar 30, 12:50 AM): Geopolitical risk from the Middle East continues to impact oil futures and critical supply chains. Semiconductor sector maintains resilience (TSMC leads, strong AI demand) despite broader volatility. Focus remains on energy supply chain stability and tech resilience.
summary.art: Art Market (Mar 30, 12:50 AM): Continued growth in digital-physical hybrid works and high-end asset diversification ahead of spring auctions.

system.raw: Dashboard auto-refresh (12:50 AM): Geopolitical energy risks remain central. Semiconductor resilience (TSMC/AI demand) highlights contrast to broader tech volatility. Art market: hybrid interest persists.
